Name: La Factoría
Full address: La Factoría, 148 C. de San Sebastián, San Juan, 00901, Puerto Rico
Description 1:
The very moment you enter our doors you can feel that La Factoría is not your ordinary bar. Our unmarked location is full of secret passages that lead to our six bars, each curated with a different ambiance and drink menu. Whether you seek to enjoy craft cocktails, dance the night away to live music, or simply relax in good company, we got you.

We are humbled to be among The World's 50 Best Bars for 5 years in a row, and for our strong alliance with the Tales of the Cocktail Foundation.
